meta.title: L&H Consulting — AI Consulting & Implementation
meta.description: We bring AI to your business. Strategy, implementation, and training — all from one source.

about.title: About us
about.lead: We're a small, hands-on team that doesn't explain AI — we build it.
about.body: Instead of slide-deck consulting, we deliver running systems: from the first workshop through prototype and integration to production. The same people who scope your project also write the code.

handsOn.title: Hands-on
handsOn.description: We build it ourselves — no sub-subcontracting to external developers.

dach.title: DACH focus
dach.description: GDPR-compliant, German-language support, local hosting options on request.

endToEnd.title: End-to-end
endToEnd.description: From strategy to deployment — one team, one accountability.

strategy.title: AI Strategy
strategy.description: We analyze your processes and identify the most impactful areas for Artificial Intelligence in your organization.

implementation.title: AI Implementation
implementation.description: From concept to production: We develop and integrate custom AI systems — chatbots, automation, intelligent workflows.

training.title: AI Training
training.description: Hands-on workshops and training that empower your team to effectively use AI tools and develop their own solutions.

references.title: Case Studies
references.subtitle: AI products built end-to-end — from concept to market.

cvschmiede.title: CV-Schmiede
cvschmiede.description: Recruiters upload resumes; the AI extracts the data and reformats it into the agency's own template — GDPR-compliant and tailored for the DACH market.

liiposter.title: LiiPoster
liiposter.description: Learns the writing voice, plans a week of content, generates posts with matching images, and auto-publishes after approval — built for consultants, coaches, and freelancers in DACH.

pricing.title: Packages & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Tailored to your use case.
pricing.body: Every project is different — so are the effort and the value. Packages are scoped individually to your goals.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready for the next step? Drop us a message.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Message sent successfully. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Failed to send. Please try again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters
